title: shorewall-nft structured config blob
description: JSON Schema for the structured config blob exchanged via `shorewall-nft config export` / `config import` and the global `--override-json` CLI flag. Matches docs/cli/override-json.md (v1). The authoritative per-file column schema lives in shorewall_nft/config/schema.py; this file is derived from it and is regenerated whenever _COLUMNS or _SECTIONED_FILES change.

schema_version.description: Envelope version. Readers accept their own version and N-1, emitters always emit N.

config_dir.description: Absolute path of the source config directory. Ignored on import; informational only.

shorewall.conf.description: KEY=VALUE settings. Merges over the parsed shorewall.conf on overlay; overlay keys win on collision.

params.description: User-defined $VAR definitions. Same merge semantics as shorewall.conf.

zones.description: Zone definitions. Columns: zone, type, options, in_options, out_options.

interfaces.description: Interface → zone bindings. Columns: zone, interface, broadcast, options.

hosts.description: Sub-zone host lists. Columns: zone, hosts, options.

policy.description: Default zone→zone verdicts. Columns: source, dest, policy, log_level, burst, connlimit.

rules.description: Filter rules. Sectioned by default under NEW / ESTABLISHED / RELATED / INVALID / UNTRACKED. Columns: action, source, dest, proto, dport, sport, orig_dest, rate, user, mark, connlimit, time, headers, switch, helper. A flat list is accepted and folds into the NEW section.

blrules.description: Blacklist rules. Sectioned. Columns: action, source, dest, proto, dport, sport.

stoppedrules.description: Rules active when the firewall is stopped. Columns: target, source, dest, proto, dport, sport.

masq.description: SNAT / masquerade rules. Columns: interface, source, address, proto, port, ipsec, mark, user, switch, orig_dest, probability.

netmap.description: 1:1 address translation. Columns: type, net1, interface, net2, proto, dport.

rawnat.description: Raw-table NAT (early DNAT, pre-conntrack). Columns: action, source, dest, proto, dport, sport, user.

conntrack.description: Conntrack helpers. Columns: action, source, dest, proto, dport, sport, user, switch.

notrack.description: Conntrack bypass. Columns: source, dest, proto, dport, sport, user.

providers.description: Routing providers (per-uplink tables). Columns: name, number, mark, interface, gateway, options.

routes.description: Static routes tied to a provider. Columns: provider, dest, gateway, device.

rtrules.description: ip rule entries. Columns: source, dest, provider, priority, mark.

tunnels.description: Tunnel definitions. Columns: type, zone, gateway, gateway_zones.

routestopped.description: Legacy routestopped file. Columns: interface, hosts, options, proto, dport, sport.

tcdevices.description: tc device definitions. Columns: interface, in_bandwidth, out_bandwidth, options, redirect.

tcclasses.description: tc classes. Columns: interface, mark, rate, ceil, priority, options.

tcfilters.description: tc filters. Columns: class, source, dest, proto, dport, sport.

tcinterfaces.description: tc interface binds. Columns: interface, type, in_bandwidth, out_bandwidth.

tcrules.description: Legacy tcrules. Columns: mark, source, dest, proto, dport, sport, user, test, length, tos, connbytes, helper, headers.

tcpri.description: tc priomap. Columns: band, proto, port, address, interface, helper.

mangle.description: Mangle-table rules. Columns: action, source, dest, proto, dport, sport, user, test, length, tos, connbytes, helper, headers, probability, dscp, state, time, switch.

accounting.description: Traffic accounting. Columns: action, chain, source, dest, proto, dport, sport, user, mark, ipsec, headers.

secmarks.description: SELinux security marks. Columns: secmark, chain, source, dest, proto, dport, sport, state.

maclist.description: MAC filtering. Columns: disposition, interface, mac, ip, assigned_interfaces.

arprules.description: ARP anti-spoof rules. Columns: action, source, dest, interface, mac.

proxyarp.description: Proxy-ARP address table. Columns: address, interface, external, haveroute, persistent.

proxyndp.description: Proxy-NDP address table. Columns: address, interface, external, haveroute, persistent.

ecn.description: ECN disable per iface/host pair. Columns: interface, host.

nfacct.description: Named nfacct accounting objects. Columns: name, packets, bytes.

scfilter.description: Source CIDR sanity filter. Columns: interface, hosts, options.

blacklist.description: Static blacklist (legacy). Columns: address, proto, port. Distinct from blrules which has the full rule grammar.

macros.description: User-defined rule macros. Key is the macro name, value is a list of rule rows using the rules schema.

scripts.description: Extension script bodies (start / started / stop / stopped / init / initdone / refresh / refreshed / restored / findgw / ifup / isusable / savesets / helpers). Value is a dict with lang + lines, or a plain list of lines, or a single string split on newlines.

rowsOrReplace.description: Either a flat list of row dicts (appended to the parsed list) or a replace sentinel dict {_replace: true, rows: [...]} that wipes the parsed list before appending.

sectionedRules.description: Section-keyed dict for rules / blrules. Keys are ?SECTION names (NEW, ESTABLISHED, RELATED, INVALID, UNTRACKED). Values are lists of rule rows merged per-section.

extra.description: Trailing columns beyond the known schema. Preserved for forward compat with future Shorewall versions.
